---
title: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

<!-- Google tag (gtag.js) -->
<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-FXEQV713CW"></script>
<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag('js', new Date());

  gtag('config', 'G-FXEQV713CW');
</script>


### Welcome to Hayato Kanayama's Website

I am a PhD student in [Graduate school of Economics, Waseda university](https://www.waseda.jp/fpse/gse/en/).
My research interests lie primarily in the areas of Labor Economics and Personnel Economics.
My current research investigates the relationship between socializing and promotion on the firm and 
Another research focus is the labor supply heterogeneity of minimum wage effect on the labor markets. 

\ 

#### Work in progress

- Minimum wage hikes and the heterogeneity of Labor supply in Japan
- Dynamics of Unemployment Insurance and Public Assistance under COVID-19 (with Michihito Ando and Masato Furuichi)
- The returns to workplace schmoozing with boss in the firm（with Yuji Kawata and Ritsu Kitagawa）

\ 

#### News
- [Fellowship: W-SPRNG](https://www.waseda.jp/wspring/program/detail/)
- [Presented our research in Asian and Australian Society of Labour Economics 2023 Conference](https://virtual.oxfordabstracts.com/#/event/public/4290/submission/245)
- [Uploaded our working Papers: Discontinuous or Kinked Response? Dynamics of Unemployment Insurance and Public Assistance under the COVID-19 Crisis (with Michihito Ando and Masato Furuichi)](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4617281)
- [Presentation (Sep 2023) : Labor Economic Conference](https://sites.google.com/site/kansailabor/conference/26th?authuser=0)
- [Awarded (Nov 2020): Hiroi Isami Award](https://www.kochi-tech.ac.jp/news/img/874d9183fe1f3661a60067d98f550bdf.pdf) 

I checked the URL `r Sys.Date()`

#### Contact Information

- ha13yato `@` toki.waseda.jp

（`r Sys.Date()` update ）
